title: Greater Gold Gear
description: Upgrade gold gear with a rare Nether smithing template to create faster, tougher Greater Gold tools and armor.
body:
# Greater Gold

Gold gear is fast but fragile. Greater Gold gives it a real progression path.

This mod adds a rare Nether upgrade template that lets you turn ordinary gold equipment into stronger Greater Gold gear with much higher durability, faster mining, and better long-term usefulness.

## Core idea
Find the **Golden Upgrade Smithing Template** in Nether structures, then combine it with gold gear and a Blaze Rod in a Smithing Table to create upgraded equipment.

## Features
- New **Greater Gold** upgrade path for gold tools and armor
- Much higher durability than vanilla gold
- Faster mining than standard gold tools
- Greater Gold pickaxe can mine at a higher tier than vanilla gold
- Template can be duplicated like other smithing templates
- Configurable stats

## Why use it
- Makes gold gear actually worth investing in
- Rewards Nether exploration
- Fits naturally into Minecraft progression
- Adds a cool alternative to standard gear paths

## Loot sources
- Nether Fortress chests
- Bastion Remnant chests

## Config
Generated on first launch. Adjust durability, mining speed, and display settings.

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
